About Me

Who is Vineet?

I'm a final-year B.Tech student in Information Technology at ABES Engineering College, Ghaziabad. I have a deep passion for building full-stack applications and intelligent AI systems — great software to me isn't just about writing code, it's about solving real problems elegantly.

My journey started with competitive programming, where I sharpened my problem-solving mindset solving 700+ DSA problems across platforms. This foundation helped me transition into building production-grade systems — from REST APIs with Node.js & Express to ML pipelines with Python and TensorFlow.

Currently gaining hands-on industry experience as a Software Engineer Intern at Kursaha Technology — optimizing backend services, building CI/CD pipelines on Azure, and improving system reliability in live production environments.
